major_arc_term_approximation_bound.statement: for all even n > majorArcThreshold and k in majorArcs(n), |rawVonMangoldtDftSquareFourierTerm(n,k) - majorArcModelTerm(n,k)| <= majorArcTermError(n,k)

major_arc_model_approximation_bound.statement: for all even n > majorArcThreshold, |sum_{k in majorArcs(n)} majorArcModelTerm(n,k) - goldbachSingularSeriesFromQuarter(n) * n| <= majorArcModelError(n)

major_arc_error_bound.statement: for all even n > majorArcThreshold, sum_{k in majorArcs(n)} majorArcTermError(n,k) + majorArcModelError(n) <= majorArcError(n)

minor_arc_dft_bound_valid.statement: for all even n > minorArcThreshold and k outside majorArcs(n), |vonMangoldtZModDft(n,k)| <= minorArcDftBound(n,k)

minor_arc_square_sum_bound.statement: for all even n > minorArcThreshold, |(n+1)^-1| * sum_{k outside majorArcs(n)} minorArcDftBound(n,k)^2 <= minorArcError(n)

total_linear_error_bound.statement: for all even n > totalLinearErrorThreshold, majorArcError(n) + minorArcError(n) <= analyticErrorCoefficient * n

notes: Template only. This is the DFT-level L2 minor-arc certificate for the current closest circle-method handoff. The analytic side must provide termwise major-frequency DFT-square approximations, a model-sum approximation to goldbachSingularSeriesFromQuarter(n) * n, a major-error summation bound, frequency-dependent minor DFT bounds, the corresponding L2 square-sum minor bound, a total linear error bound, and final canonical contamination threshold coverage.
